1.title: Disk read time
1.query:
timeseries read = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.disk-devices.disk.latency.read),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(read) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Disk write time
2.query:
timeseries write = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.disk-devices.disk.latency.write),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(write) desc
| limit 20
